SEARCH
Package net.boricj.bft.coff.constants

Class CoffSectionFlags

java.lang.Object
net.boricj.bft.coff.constants.CoffSectionFlags
public class CoffSectionFlags extends Object
Mutable builder-style wrapper around COFF section flags.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final int
    IMAGE_SCN_ALIGN_1024BYTES
    Section alignment is 1024 bytes.
    static final int
    IMAGE_SCN_ALIGN_128BYTES
    Section alignment is 128 bytes.
    static final int
    IMAGE_SCN_ALIGN_16BYTES
    Section alignment is 16 bytes.
    static final int
    IMAGE_SCN_ALIGN_1BYTES
    Section alignment is 1 byte.
    static final int
    IMAGE_SCN_ALIGN_2048BYTES
    Section alignment is 2048 bytes.
    static final int
    IMAGE_SCN_ALIGN_256BYTES
    Section alignment is 256 bytes.
    static final int
    IMAGE_SCN_ALIGN_2BYTES
    Section alignment is 2 bytes.
    static final int
    IMAGE_SCN_ALIGN_32BYTES
    Section alignment is 32 bytes.
    static final int
    IMAGE_SCN_ALIGN_4096BYTES
    Section alignment is 4096 bytes.
    static final int
    IMAGE_SCN_ALIGN_4BYTES
    Section alignment is 4 bytes.
    static final int
    IMAGE_SCN_ALIGN_512BYTES
    Section alignment is 512 bytes.
    static final int
    IMAGE_SCN_ALIGN_64BYTES
    Section alignment is 64 bytes.
    static final int
    IMAGE_SCN_ALIGN_8192BYTES
    Section alignment is 8192 bytes.
    static final int
    IMAGE_SCN_ALIGN_8BYTES
    Section alignment is 8 bytes.
    static final int
    IMAGE_SCN_CNT_CODE
    Section contains executable code.
    static final int
    IMAGE_SCN_CNT_INITIALIZED_DATA
    Section contains initialized data.
    static final int
    IMAGE_SCN_CNT_UNINITIALIZED_DATA
    Section contains uninitialized data.
    static final int
    IMAGE_SCN_GPREL
    Section contents can be accessed relative to GP.
    static final int
    IMAGE_SCN_LNK_COMDAT
    Section contents are COMDAT data.
    static final int
    IMAGE_SCN_LNK_INFO
    Section contains comments or other information.
    static final int
    IMAGE_SCN_LNK_NRELOC_OVFL
    Section has more than 65535 relocations.
    static final int
    IMAGE_SCN_LNK_OTHER
    Reserved link flag.
    static final int
    IMAGE_SCN_LNK_REMOVE
    Section contents should not become part of the image.
    static final int
    IMAGE_SCN_MEM_16BIT
    Reserved memory flag alias.
    static final int
    IMAGE_SCN_MEM_DISCARDABLE
    Section can be discarded as needed.
    static final int
    IMAGE_SCN_MEM_EXECUTE
    Section is executable.
    static final int
    IMAGE_SCN_MEM_LOCKED
    Reserved memory flag alias.
    static final int
    IMAGE_SCN_MEM_NOT_CACHED
    Section should not be cached.
    static final int
    IMAGE_SCN_MEM_NOT_PAGED
    Section should not be paged.
    static final int
    IMAGE_SCN_MEM_PRELOAD
    Reserved memory flag alias.
    static final int
    IMAGE_SCN_MEM_PURGEABLE
    Reserved memory flag alias.
    static final int
    IMAGE_SCN_MEM_READ
    Section is readable.
    static final int
    IMAGE_SCN_MEM_SHARED
    Section can be shared in memory.
    static final int
    IMAGE_SCN_MEM_WRITE
    Section is writable.
    static final int
    IMAGE_SCN_TYPE_NO_PAD
    Section should not be padded to the next boundary.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    CoffSectionFlags()
    Creates flags with all bits cleared.
    CoffSectionFlags(int value)
    Creates flags with an initial encoded value.

  • Constructor Details

    • CoffSectionFlags

      public CoffSectionFlags()
      Creates flags with all bits cleared.

    • CoffSectionFlags

      public CoffSectionFlags(int value)
      Creates flags with an initial encoded value.
      Parameters:
      value - initial section flags value

      Gets the encoded flags value.

    • isTypeNoPad

      public boolean isTypeNoPad()
      Checks whether IMAGE_SCN_TYPE_NO_PAD is set.
      Returns:
      true if set, false otherwise
